sources.name: Simon Willison's Weblog
sources.notes: High-signal LLM commentary; reliably covers Anthropic/OpenAI/Google announcements, so official feeds that lack RSS are covered here.

sources.name: OpenAI News
sources.notes: Official announcements. Ignore pure marketing posts.

sources.notes: Research-adjacent analysis of the LLM landscape.

sources.name: Hacker News (best)
sources.notes: Community-ranked. Only genuinely technical items make the brief; skip business news and flamebait.

sources.notes: Technical link aggregator; lower noise than HN.

sources.notes: Industry engineering analysis; free posts only appear in the feed.
